title: El derecho de nacer
writer: Félix B. Caignet, Ramón Pérez Peláez, Jesús Galindo
actors: Gloria Marín, Jorge Mistral, Martha Roth
plot: In Santiago de Cuba in the early 1950s, history begins. A young woman of high society becomes pregnant with a false love, her father orders his black maid (Dolores) to kill the baby (Alberto), but she flees to Havana where Alberto...
